ab: lalu ni yaba mu ga Pihaw Bawxin.
en: My dad’s name is Pihaw Bawxin.

ab: lalu ni yaya mu ga Pitay Tuyaw.
en: My mother’s name is Pitay Tuyaw.

ab: kyan utux bsuyan mu tmalung, lalu nya ga Tahus Pihaw, mpuw utux kayan nya la.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Tahus Pihaw，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is kulas, he is 11 years old.

ab: niya sami mgluw miru sku utux pkba’an biru.
ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: kuzing ru bsuyan mu tmalung Tahus ga sgalan myan m’uwas.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: smogan kung mlngya, ryax hngi’an mutu sami mgluw musa mlngya utux sali.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: smogan kung mkbba sa g’anus rawin ba sami mgluw m’uwas ru mlngya.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
